sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sihna mualkuam galah, khuapi khat a om hi,
A hoihna kua ma'n gen zolo hi,
Zan kimlai in tuuno khuavak bang in tang a,
Tua lai ah nitumlo, singteh zong vulngeilo,
Midikte a tawntung aksi bang in tanga,
Tua a etlawm kham khuapi sungah.
Tua lai ah dahna natna kahna om nawn lo,
Misiang khempeuh zong teekthei nawn lo,
Tua khua ah ut zensing zan khuamial lah beita,
Tua a etlawm kham khuapi sung ah.
